title: tanghinia odollam
intro: Tanghinia odollam, also known as the Madagascar periwinkle, is a flowering plant native to the island of Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tanghinia odollam include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Tanghinia odollam can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be confirmed by a healthcare professional.
